visual_description: Two men stand facing each other in a room with framed artwork on the wall behind them; one wears a pink plaid shirt and the other a blue plaid shirt. The man in the pink shirt turns slightly toward the other, who stands with his back partially to the camera and appears to be speaking. The man in the blue shirt looks directly at the other, his posture upright and his gaze focused.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and moderate speed, sounding and concerned.
